issues.description: SearchDeck action is incomplete. Missing specification of deck top position (5 cards), card type filter ({The Seven Warlords of the Sea}), revelation requirement (reveal up to 1), and bottom deck placement logic for remaining cards.

Action sequence does not capture the multi-step process: (1) look at top 5, (2) reveal up to 1 matching type card to hand, (3) place rest at bottom in any order. Current DSL only attempts a generic SearchDeck.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On Play] Look at 5 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 {The Seven Warlords of the Sea} type card and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.

filter.value: The Seven Warlords of the Sea
